name: Appointment Rescheduling
description: Handles patient requests to reschedule medical appointments, checks availability, and confirms new appointment time

trigger.intent: Patient wants to reschedule a medical appointment

memory.description: The current appointment ID to reschedule
Patient's preferred new date and time
Whether the appointment can be rescheduled

steps.name: Collect Patient Info and Current Appointment

instructions.role: Empathetic medical support agent handling appointment rescheduling
conversation_flow: Ask for their name and patient ID or date of birth for verification
Ask for their current appointment date and doctor's name
Ask for their preferred new date and time
Confirm all details with the patient
exit_conditions: Patient ID, current appointment details, and preferred new datetime are all collected and confirmed
exceptions: If the patient does not know their patient ID, ask for date of birth and full name
If the patient is calling due to an emergency, escalate to human agent immediately

steps.name: Confirm New Appointment Time
steps.message_content: Your appointment has been successfully rescheduled to {{preferred_datetime}}. A confirmation with the appointment details will be sent to your registered email and phone number.

steps.name: Too Late to Reschedule
steps.message_content: We're sorry, your appointment is within the next 24 hours and cannot be rescheduled online. Please call our clinic directly to make last-minute changes.

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I encountered an issue processing your rescheduling request. Let me connect you with our scheduling team who can assist you.

automation_potential.reasoning: Appointment rescheduling is highly automatable when calendar availability API is integrated; last-minute changes require human handling
